scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend\my-project && npm run build && rmdir /s /q ..\..\server\public && mkdir ..\..\server\public && xcopy dist ..\..\server\public /E /I /Y
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:server
scripts.deploy: npm run build && scp -r server\dist server\public admin@192.168.1.71:~/app/server/ && ssh admin@192.168.1.71 "pm2 reload server"
